channel.title: Vue on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Vue on Arrans github.io

item.title: aleksey-hoffman/sigma-file-manager
item.description: “Sigma File Manager” is a free, open-source, quickly evolving, modern file manager (explorer / browser) app for Windows and Linux.

item.title: Lissy93/dashy
item.description: 🚀 A self-hostable personal dashboard built for you. Includes status-checking, widgets, themes, icon packs, a UI editor and tons more!

item.title: m1k1o/neko
item.description: A self hosted virtual browser that runs in docker and uses WebRTC.

item.title: tranxuanthang/lrcget
item.description: Utility for mass-downloading LRC synced lyrics for your offline music library.

item.title: flawiddsouza/Restfox
item.description: Offline-First Minimalistic HTTP & Socket Testing Client for the Web & Desktop

item.title: TannerMidd/minimal-chat
item.description: MinimalChat is a lightweight, open-source chat application that allows you to interact with various large language models.
